enumeration_literals.name: minor
enumeration_literals.description:
Extra ';', ')', value out of range, etc.: we can continue the
   compilation normally for catching other possible errors.

enumeration_literals.name: medium
enumeration_literals.description:
Compilation is shortened at some points in order to avoid
   infinite loops in the parser. Tricky!

enumeration_literals.name: major
enumeration_literals.description: In this case, the best choice is to STOP the compilation immediately.

simple_types.name: Table_OverFlow_Error
simple_types.code:
type Table_OverFlow_Error is
  (IDENTIFIERS,
   PROCEDURES,
   FLOAT_CONSTANTS,
   ARRAYS,
   LEVELS,
   Loop_Nesting_Levels,
   Object_Code,
   Case_Labels,
   …,
   PATCHING);

subprograms.name: Error
Fatal
subprograms.code: procedure Fatal (N : Table_OverFlow_Error; Current_Error_Output : Boolean := False)

subprograms.name: Remark
Remark
